summary: Iter 164 On/Off-roll gating by Firm Master 'Offline Salary' — VERIFIED PASS. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass (test_iter164_onroll_gating.py) covering (a) PATCH /api/admin/user-role + PATCH /api/admin/employees/{uid}/profile → 400 when offline_salary=false, (b) POST /api/admin/employees silently coerces is_onroll=false→true (stored doc verified via Mongo), (c) after flipping offline_salary=true, user-role off-roll transition returns 200, (d) POST /api/admin/compliance-salary-runs for cmp_527fecdd7c month 2026-07 EXCLUDES off-roll user_44cd6f561da0 (SURENDRA SINGH) both when payload sends is_onroll:false and when it omits is_onroll — on-roll employees are still included (rows>0). Frontend: (i) /employee-add with Kankani selected shows a single locked 'On-roll' chip and the hint 'Offline Salary is disabled for this firm — employees join On-roll directly.' (Off-roll chip absent, count=0). (ii) /employee-master?user_id=user_44cd6f561da0 → Grouping card shows the toggle with hint 'Locked to On-roll — Offline Salary is disabled for this firm in Firm Master.'; tapping [data-testid=grouping-onroll-toggle] does NOT flip state. (iii) PWA employee login (TEST50 / 123456) → Profile tab → Personal details shows 'SALARY ROLL: On-roll'. All Mongo state restored (offline_salary=false, user_44cd6f561da0 is_onroll=true, temp employee deleted, self-created compliance runs deleted; pre-existing 2026-07 runs from 2026-07-09 untouched).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exceeds 19,000 lines — Iter 164 logic is spread across ~7559, ~12449, ~14311, ~14540. Consider extracting the on/off-roll gating helpers (_firm_offline_salary_enabled + the compliance-run scope block) into a small module to improve maintainability; not a functional bug.
seed_data_creation: None permanent. Temporary employee (phone +919000164164) created and deleted within the same run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 164 fully verified. Firm cmp_527fecdd7c currently has salary_process={online_salary:true, offline_salary:false} — restored. Off-roll gating is enforced both in the API layer (400) and in Compliance _compute_compliance_run (forced $or on is_onroll for run_type!='off_roll'). Note: _compute_salary_run (Actual salary) intentionally still allows off-roll and is NOT bug per user directive. For frontend testing use localStorage keys 'llc_session_token' + 'skc:selected_company' to short-circuit login/firm-select in Playwright.
